title: Minecraft: Pirates Evolved
description: A simple, lightweight modpack focused on creating a vanilla+ experience with the backbone of this modpack being Eureka! by rubydesic.
body:
Embark on an epic adventure in Minecraft: Pirates Evolved! Explore a set of custom-made islands, each filled with hidden treasures, ancient ruins, and pirate lore. Sail the seas, discover new lands, and uncover the mysteries of these dangerous waters. Whether you're searching for treasure or just enjoying the island scenery, this modpack offers endless exploration and pirate-themed fun. With muskets and flintknocks via the _black powder weapons / guns_ mod created by cave_gamer45. Are you ready to set sail?

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daniinatorul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daniinatorul)

It is recommended to use this modpack with about 8G of RAM. 
If installing this modpack on a server, please remember to remove Distant Horizons from the modlist as it WILL NOT run on a server. You could also remove any other client side mods if wanted. A serverside modpack may be released but there is no guaruntee.

There was also an issue discovered with JER(Just Enough Resources) when trying to join a server. If you are joining a server you will likely need to remove this mod.
